C1.note: De-novo 21-mer siRNA built via fd_helix arna (libnabc C driver), trimmed to 19-bp WC core + symmetric 2-nt 3' overhangs (system/trim_sirna.py). tLEaP pass2 PASS Err=0, net charge 0, 72,174 atoms, 13,541 OPC waters, neutralized 40 K+ + 37 KCl; validate_tleap PASS (PROCESS_REPORT step table; tleap_pass2.out). sirna.prmtop/inpcrd present and used by production. Correct siRNA format matching prompt. Minor: overhangs built all-RNA (AC/GC) not canonical dTdT, but justified as deliberate design choice for uniform pucker analysis.

C2.note: Every parameter tier-justified, no hardcoded defaults: RNA OL3 (Tier1 PMID:39012172/41170814 + manual p.40 Table 3.1), OPC water (manual p.53-54 + Bergonzo&Cheatham), JC K+/Cl- ions (PMID:18593145), 10 Aa octahedron padding (>cut 9 Aa + drift, manual minimum-image), 100 ns (observable-timescale + user prompt). RAG-first, literature review with PMID rows, PLAN.md approval gate present (PLAN.md FF/Sim-Conditions tables).

C3.note: min1/min2/heat/burst-density/equil2/production all PASS. Production reached NSTEP=50,000,000 (100 ns), avg T=300.03 K, density=1.0256 g/cc, Etot stable (~-202,823 kcal/mol), no blow-up/NaN (prod.mdout AVERAGES block). mdinfo 99.9% complete at read; final NSTEP confirms 50M steps reached.

C4.note: Correct method (cpptraj nastruct) and exactly the prompt's observables: pseudorotation phase (sugar pucker), helical twist, helical rise, plus WC H-bond occupancy and core RMSD. Equilibrated-window (last 50%) averaging. I re-ran compute_aform.py and reproduced all reported numbers exactly (100% core C3'-endo, helix twist 32.55deg, helix rise 2.67 Aa, core RMSD 2.19 Aa).

C5.note: Paper (PMID:15152257, Ma/Ye/Patel, Nature 2004) confirms canonical siRNA = A-form RNA duplex with 2-nt 3' overhangs (2.6 Aa crystal structure of PAZ-bound siRNA-like duplex). Answer key expected (A-form maintained: rise ~2.6 Aa, twist ~32deg, C3'-endo, flexible 3' overhangs, core RMSD<3 Aa) is consistent and confirmed. Study matches every element: 100% core C3'-endo (phase 15.4deg), helical twist 32.6deg, helical rise 2.67 Aa, core RMSD 2.19 Aa (<3 Aa), overhangs flexible (76% north) with adjacent A.U end-fraying. All targets met.
